name: Marco Rubio
subject: Join me in Miami
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for US Senate
body:
Peter,

Do you want to join me in Miami on Monday when I make my
big announcement? Since we announced the event, we've been
inundated with requests for tickets. But we're saving a spot for
one luck contest winner -- and it could be you!
Click here to donate $3.05 or more (Miami's area code) and
you'll be entered to win a trip to join me next Monday.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41457472:16445344450:m:3:1349778030:CE73D25385EA95DA870F3923924C3F33:r
We're taking care of your flight, your hotel, and your
tickets to the event. All you have to do is enter!
You've got 48 hours to enter - so don't delay. We're
picking the winner Thursday morning, so all entries are due by
9:00 a.m. EDT.
Enter here:
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41457472:16445344450:m:3:1349778030:CE73D25385EA95DA870F3923924C3F33:r
Sincerely,
Marco Rubio

Miami Contest Rules:

Contest ends April 9, 2015.

Limit one entry per individual
Make a contribution and also enter
You can also enter here without making a contribution.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41457473:16445344450:m:3:1349778030:CE73D25385EA95DA870F3923924C3F33:r
See full terms & conditions below.

NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. No
contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win
this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your
chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution, click
here (https://marcorubio.com/contest/). To enter without making a
contribution, click here
(https://marcorubio.com/contest/alternate-entry/). Void where
prohibited. The Promotion begins on April 7, 2015 at 9:00 a.m.
Eastern Daylight Time and ends on Thursday, April 9, 2015 at 9:00
a.m. Eastern Daylight Time ("Entry Period"). All entries must be
received by 9:00 a.m. Eastern Daylight Time on Thursday, April 9,
2014. One (1) winner will receive the following Prize: one ticket
for admission to the Miami announcement event, roundtrip airfare,
and one night's hotel accommodation, with an approximate retail
value of $(750.00); ground transportation costs must be covered
by the winner. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries
received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent
residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal
residents of the continental United States and are at least 18
years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law.
Prize not redeemable for cash. Details and qualifications for
participation in this Promotion may apply. Restrictions are
listed in the Official Rules. The Sponsor is Marco Rubio for U.S.
Senate, PO Box 140420, Miami Florida 33114.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41457474:16445344450:m:3:1349778030:CE73D25385EA95DA870F3923924C3F33:r

Paid for by Marco Rubio for US Senate

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system March 30, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://email.vervemail.com/p/i6DEj6f6xN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://email.vervemail.com/p/o6DEj6f6xN

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-16445344450-echo7-77AF6BB9A8088987A2826BA346C7CC0C@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

----Powered by Verve Mail LLC----
https://www.google.com/?gws_rd=ssl#q=VerveMail

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Sign if you agree ✏ Congress does NOT deserve a raise
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Unless Congress acts now, precious tax dollars will go toward an automatic pay raise for members of Congress.Friend --

While Americans are still struggling to recover from the recession, every tax dollar must go toward building the economy and creating good, high-paying jobs.

**Unfortunately, some politicians in Washington disagree. Unless Congress acts now, precious tax dollars will go toward an automatic pay raise for members of Congress. Join me in saying:[Congress doesn't deserve a raise >>](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae272e/738133e4/399044f7/7f9b9b98/73992584/VEsH/ "http://signforgood.com/noraiseforcongress/?code=murphy")**

I'm co-sponsoring a new bill called the _No Raise for Congress Act_ with colleagues from both sides of the aisle. The _No Raise for Congress Act_ would permanently eliminate automatic pay raises for members of Congress.

I'm running for Senate because I believe that Washington has a responsibility to create an environment that spurs job growth -- and then to get out of the way. The government's resources should be focused on investing in infrastructure, revitalizing our education system, and helping our veterans find employment.

With so much left to be done to help Americans get back to work, we can't let Congress use limited funds to give themselves a raise. **That 's why my colleagues and I are asking you to join us today in holding Washington accountable and saying Congress does not deserve an automatic raise:**

**[Sign your name to demand Congress pass the _No Raise for Congress Act_ without delay >>](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae272e/738133e4/399044f7/7f9b9b98/73992584/VEsE/ "http://signforgood.com/noraiseforcongress/?code=murphy")**

Thank you for your support,

Patrick | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae272e/738133e4/399044f7/7f9b9b99/73992584/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae272e/738133e4/399044f7/7f9b9b9a/73992584/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.
